notes: Full dinner menu captured (starters/charcuterie, salads, house specialties, butcher's special, sides, desserts). Two market-price items (Poisson du Jour, Steak Frites). Wine-by-the-glass list (20+) and cocktails are not published on the menu page — only corkage ($25/750mL) is noted; beverages left empty and flagged for a separate capture. '*' marks on some items are raw/undercooked warnings, not dietary tags.

dishes.name: French Onion Soup
dishes.description: Chicken broth, white wine sweet onion, pain de mie crouton, Comté and parmesan cheese.

dishes.name: Calamars à la Provençal
dishes.description: Squid sautéed with olive oil, garlic, parsley, capers & lemon. Served with Grand Central Bakery baguette.

dishes.name: Pâté de Campagne
dishes.description: Country style pork & chicken liver. Served with baguette, pickled vegetables and mustards.

dishes.name: Escargot de Bourgogne
dishes.description: Wild Burgundy snails baked with parsley, garlic & shallot butter. Served with crostini.

dishes.name: Tartare de Boeuf
dishes.description: Hand chopped beef, shallots capers, Dijon, quail egg yolk. Served with arugula salad in verjus vinaigrette and crostini.

dishes.name: Jambon de Bayonne
dishes.description: French cured ham, 2oz sliced meats, served with baguette, pickled vegetables & mustards.

dishes.name: Saucisson Lyonnais
dishes.description: Cooked pork salami with pistachios, 2oz sliced meats.

dishes.name: Rosette de Campagne
dishes.description: French cured pork salami, 2oz sliced meats.

dishes.name: Fromage
dishes.description: Your choice of soft, semi-hard or blue. 1.5oz. Served with baguette, house confiture, toasted walnuts, fruit.

dishes.name: Salade Verte
dishes.description: Mixed greens in sherry vinaigrette. Add Roquefort or Chèvre $6, Carrot Slaw $6, Celeriac Remoulade $7, chilled Dungeness crab $22.

dishes.name: Petit Bucherondin de Chèvre
dishes.description: Goat cheese baked on croustade. Served with frisée and arugula salad in scallion vinaigrette.

dishes.name: Beet Burrata Salad
dishes.description: Roasted golden beets tossed in verjus. Served with arugula, beet emulsion and topped with roasted pistachio and pistachio oil.

dishes.name: Black Olive Pasta
dishes.description: House made spaghetti, olive butter, tomato–anchovy sauce, Manchego cheese, fried capers.

dishes.name: Lamb Burger
dishes.description: Freshly ground lamb, grilled & served on potato bun with balsamic onions, roasted red peppers, garlic aioli and pommes frites.

dishes.name: Beef Burger
dishes.description: Ground Palouse River Beef on potato bun, sherry shallots, mayonnaise, Comté cheese. Served with pommes frites.

dishes.name: Roasted Half Chicken
dishes.description: Heritage Poulet Rouge, pan-roasted organic half chicken, natural jus. Served with roasted potatoes and shallots.

dishes.name: Poisson du Jour
dishes.description: Chef's choice of fish and preparation.

dishes.name: Magret de Canard
dishes.description: Pan roasted and sliced duck breast served on top of ratatouille.

dishes.name: Boeuf Bourguignon
dishes.description: Classic French stew, red wine braised beef brisket, pearl onions, cremini mushrooms, carrots and bacon. Served with mashed potatoes.

dishes.name: Steak Frites
dishes.description: Chef's choice of steak cut, pan-roasted and served with pommes frites, Roquefort butter or anchovy butter.

dishes.name: Pommes Frites
dishes.description: Fried in peanut oil and served with garlic aioli.

dishes.name: Sauteed Vegetables
dishes.description: Herb butter, shallots, lemon, garlic parmesan.

dishes.name: Carrot Slaw
dishes.description: Garlic lemon vinaigrette.

dishes.name: Celeriac Remoulade
dishes.description: Creamy mustard vinaigrette.

dishes.name: Opera Cake
dishes.description: Almond sponge cake, coffee syrup, French butter cream, chocolate ganache with glazed mandarin segments.

dishes.name: Glace ou Sorbet du Jour
dishes.description: House-made ice cream or sorbet, sable Breton cookie.

dishes.name: Prune Armagnac Glace
dishes.description: With sable breton cookie.

dishes.name: Crème Brûlée
dishes.description: Vanilla bean crème brûlée, sable breton cookie.

dishes.name: Chocolate Cognac Mousse
dishes.description: Crème chantilly, almond shortbread cookie.

dishes.name: Baba au Rhum
dishes.description: Traditional rum syrup soaked yeast cake, crème chantilly.

dishes.name: Caramelized Lemon Tart
dishes.description: Creme chantilly, raspberry coulis, pistachio brittle.
